title: Vollot
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Vollot.jpg]] |name=Vollot |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]], which include the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Vollot in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{CSWECite|III|193|Stormtrooper}} establishes that all [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were [[Human/Legends|Humans]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. |gender= |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]][[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]] **[[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Sergeant Vollot, is your ''bomb squad'' ready?''"
"''Yes, sir, Captain Treece, we'll begin energy scans immediately.|Treece and Vollot|}} [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Vollot''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], where he served as a [[bomb squad stormtrooper]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Vollot's [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was responsible for disarming [[Bomb/Legends|bombs]] that had been allegedly set up by the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. However, the squad was [[Death/Legends|blown up]] in the process. ==Biography== {{Quote|Sir, the Ugnaughts have always been law-abiding workers. Did they give any ''reasons'' for suddenly turning traitors?''"
"''None that concern you, soldier. Now, begin scanning.|Vollot and Treece|}} Vollot was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], serving as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Vollot's [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[bomb squad stormtrooper]]s were dispatched to [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], where they were greeted by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hugo Treece]], who asked if the squad was ready. Vollot affirmed that they were, explaining that they would immediately begin energy scans and would easily disarm the [[Bomb/Legends|explosives]] once they were found. Treece was pleased to hear this, and [[Gender/Legends|he]] was eager to be able to focus their attention to the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] that he claimed had planted the bombs. Vollot expressed confusion, as the Ugnaughts had been nothing but law-abiding workers, but Treece brushed off the [[Soldier/Legends|soldier's]] concern, noting that it did not involve Vollot. [[File:VollotBomb.png|thumb|left|275px|Vollot finds the bomb.]] With the help of the sergeant, the squad found its first bomb, much to Treece's approval. As the captain was about to give the order to disarm it, the bomb began speaking, giving instructions on how to disarm it. Although Treece and the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] were taken aback by the talking bomb, they proceeded with the disarming, taking the bomb's word. In reality, however, the speaker was Cloud City [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who was trying to [[Death/Legends|eliminate]] the Imperial presence in the [[City/Legends|city]]. Once the squad was almost done, one of the stormtroopers pointed out that it sounded more like the bomb had been activated than deactivated. Indeed, the bomb exploded, killing the squad, with Calrissian jeering at them through the speaker. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|As soon as we've located the explosives, we shouldn't have any trouble disarming them.|Vollot|}} When Treece implicated the Ugnaughts for having planted bombs, Vollot was curious to know their reasoning behind such a crime. ==Skills and abilities== {{Quote|Good work, sergeant. Your scans have located the first bomb.|Treece|}} Vollot's good work was praised by Captain Treece. ==Equipment== The sergeant was well-[[Blaster/Legends|armed]] and wore [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]]. ==Behind the scenes== Vollot appeared in the [[Star Wars (1977) 56|fifty-sixth]] issue of [[Marvel Comics]]' [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was writen by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and [[Tom Palmer]] and published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[October 20]], [[1981]].''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]'' ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' (1977) 56]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 56}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Vollot}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Stormtroopers of the Galactic Empire]]
